witnesses.description: A three-point finite topology quotiented by the partition {a,b} | {c}.

checks.claim: The listed quotient map is surjective and its fibers induce the listed equivalence relation.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes fibers from the total map, checks surjectivity, and rebuilds the same-fiber equivalence relation.

checks.claim: The quotient topology contains exactly the subsets whose preimages are open in the source topology.
checks.notes: The validator enumerates every subset of the quotient universe and accepts precisely those with open preimage.

checks.claim: The saturated open set {a,b} maps to the quotient-open set {p}.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes image({a,b})={p}, preimage({p})={a,b}, saturation by fibers, and openness on both sides.

checks.claim: The two listed representatives in the same quotient fiber have distinct quotient images.

data.alethe_representative_claim: q(a) != q(b) while q(a) = q(b) = p
data.certificate: prove_qf_uf_unsat_alethe emits Evidence::UnsatAletheProof; Evidence::check independently rechecks the proof against the source assertions.

checks.notes: Finite replay computes q(a)=q(b)=p for the same quotient fiber; the source QF_UF artifact isolates the malformed distinct-image claim for checked Alethe evidence.

checks.claim: The singleton {r} is open in the quotient topology.

data.certificate: prove_qf_uf_unsat_alethe emits Evidence::UnsatAletheProof; Evidence::check independently rechecks the proof against the source assertions.

checks.notes: Finite replay computes preimage({r})={c}, which is not open in the source topology. The linked QF_UF artifact checks the isolated open-status contradiction through Alethe evidence.

checks.claim: General quotient-space theorems require future proof resources.

data.target_theorem_shape: quotient topology universal property, quotient-map continuity, saturated-open correspondence, quotient preservation or failure of compactness/connectedness properties, and invariance under quotient constructions for arbitrary spaces
data.future_checker: Lean modules for quotient topologies, saturated sets, quotient maps, continuity, separation axioms, compactness/connectedness preservation theorems, and proof reconstruction from finite quotient certificates

checks.notes: The finite rows replay one explicit quotient map and one false open-set claim; they do not prove arbitrary quotient-space theorems.
